text: I feel a sense of quiet curiosity as I walk through this modern, carefully designed space. The environment is open yet structured, filled with the soft hum of technology and the silent invitation of learning. Standing before the R+D wall, I am reminded of the restless human urge to explore, innovate, and understand our place alongside intelligent machines. There is a trace of anticipation here—perhaps the promise of discovery, or the subtle dawning of new ideas waiting just beyond the glass.
